eng.definition: Exaggerated statements or claims not meant to be taken literally.
examples: His claim of being the smartest person in the room was clearly a hyperbole.
Her story was filled with hyperbole to make it more entertaining.
The politician's promise of eradicating crime was a hyperbole.
हमारे संगठन में 500 से अधिक कर्मचारी हैं।
हमें इस परियोजना के लिए एक संगठन तैयार करना होगा।
